name: Zombie
description: Slow but relentless undead that spawn in darkness. Can break wooden doors on Hard difficulty and pick up dropped armor/weapons. Baby zombies are faster and fit through 1-block gaps.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, any solid block

name: Skeleton
description: Ranged undead archers that strafe to avoid attacks. Seek shade during daytime to avoid burning. Shields fully block their arrows. Can pick up dropped armor and weapons.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, any solid block

name: Creeper
description: Silent explosive mob that detonates when close to players. Scared of cats and ocelots. Charged creepers (created by lightning) drop mob heads when their explosion kills another mob.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, any solid block

name: Spider
description: Wall-climbing arthropod that is hostile at night but neutral during the day. Fits through 1-wide gaps. Can spawn with potion effects on Hard difficulty (speed, strength, regeneration, or invisibility).
spawnConditions: Light level 0, 2×2×1 space, solid block

name: Cave Spider
description: Smaller, venomous spider found only in mineshafts. Inflicts Poison on Normal and Hard difficulty. Fits through 0.5-block gaps, making spawner farms tricky to build.
spawnConditions: Mineshaft mob spawners only

name: Enderman
description: Tall teleporting mob that becomes hostile when you look at its eyes (crosshair on upper body). Damaged by water and rain. Cannot pick up most blocks. Wearing a carved pumpkin prevents accidental aggro.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, any solid block, 3-block tall space

name: Witch
description: Potion-throwing hostile mob that drinks healing, fire resistance, water breathing, and speed potions to protect itself. Villagers struck by lightning become witches.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, any solid block; or swamp huts

name: Slime
description: Bouncing cube that splits into smaller slimes when killed (large→medium→small). Found in swamps at night (Y 51-69) and in slime chunks below Y=40 at any light level.
spawnConditions: Slime chunks below Y=40 (any light); or swamp at night Y=51-69

name: Ghast
description: Large floating Nether mob that shoots explosive fireballs. Its fireballs can be deflected back by hitting them (melee or arrow). A single reflected fireball kills it.
spawnConditions: Light level 0-11, 5×4×5 open space in the Nether

name: Zombified Piglin
description: Neutral undead piglin that swarms in groups when provoked — all nearby ones become hostile. Created when pigs are struck by lightning in the Overworld. Also spawn from nether portals.
spawnConditions: Nether, any light level; or nether portals (Overworld)

name: Blaze
description: Flying Nether mob that shoots triple fireballs. Damaged by snowballs (3 damage each). Blaze rods are essential for brewing stands and eyes of ender.
spawnConditions: Nether fortress, light level 0-11

name: Magma Cube
description: Nether version of slimes that splits when killed. Immune to fire and fall damage. Unlike slimes, even small magma cubes deal damage on contact.
spawnConditions: Nether, light level 0-11

name: Wither Skeleton
description: Tall skeleton variant found in Nether fortresses. Inflicts 10s Wither effect on hit. Skulls (2.5% drop rate, increased by Looting) are needed to summon the Wither boss.
spawnConditions: Nether fortress, light level 0-7, 3-block tall space

name: Endermite
description: Tiny hostile mob with a 5% chance to spawn when ender pearls are thrown. Endermen are hostile toward them — useful for enderman farms. Despawns after 2 minutes unless named.
spawnConditions: 5% chance from ender pearl use

name: Silverfish
description: Small arthropod hidden in infested stone blocks. When attacked, nearby silverfish swarm out of adjacent infested blocks. Kill them quickly in one hit to prevent chain alerts.
spawnConditions: Stronghold spawners; or infested blocks in mountains/igloos

name: Guardian
description: Aquatic mob that guards ocean monuments with a laser beam attack. The beam charges for 2 seconds before dealing damage — break line of sight to reset it.
spawnConditions: Water in ocean monument bounding box

name: Elder Guardian
description: Boss-like guardian that inflicts Mining Fatigue III on nearby players every 60 seconds. Three spawn per ocean monument and do not respawn once killed.
spawnConditions: 3 per ocean monument, do not respawn

name: Shulker
description: Box-shaped End mob that shoots homing levitation bullets. Teleports when hit at low health. Shulker shells craft shulker boxes — the most important storage item in the game.
spawnConditions: End cities, does not despawn

name: Evoker
description: Powerful illager spellcaster that summons fang lines and vexes. Always drops a Totem of Undying (100%). Turns blue sheep red as an easter egg.
spawnConditions: Woodland mansions; raids wave 5+

name: Vindicator
description: Axe-wielding illager that deals up to 19.5 damage on Hard. One of the most dangerous raid mobs. Named "Johnny" will attack all mobs.
spawnConditions: Woodland mansions; raids wave 1+

name: Pillager
description: Crossbow-wielding illager that patrols the Overworld. Killing a patrol captain gives Bad Omen, triggering a raid when entering a village.
spawnConditions: Pillager outposts; patrols (every 10-11 min); raids

name: Ravager
description: Massive beast that appears in raids. Destroys crops and leaves on contact. Can be stunned for 2 seconds by blocking its attack with a shield.
spawnConditions: Raids wave 3+

name: Vex
description: Tiny flying mob summoned by evokers. Phases through blocks and attacks with an iron sword. Takes damage over time and eventually dies on its own.
spawnConditions: Summoned by evokers

name: Husk
description: Desert zombie variant that inflicts Hunger and does not burn in sunlight. Converts to a regular zombie if submerged in water for 30 seconds.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, desert surface (exposed to sky)

name: Stray
description: Icy skeleton variant that shoots Slowness-tipped arrows (30s duration). Does not burn in sunlight. Drops tipped arrows of Slowness as a rare drop.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, frozen biomes (exposed to sky)

name: Drowned
description: Underwater zombie that can throw tridents (ranged attack). Trident drop rate is 6.25% (+ Looting). Zombies submerged in water for 45 seconds convert into drowned.
spawnConditions: Water, light level 0; or zombie conversion after 45s underwater

name: Phantom
description: Flying undead that swoops down on players who haven't slept for 3+ in-game days. Burns in daylight. Membranes repair elytra on an anvil and brew Slow Falling potions.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, player hasn't slept for 3+ days, above sea level

name: Piglin
description: Nether mob that barters random items for gold ingots (throw or right-click). Hostile unless you wear at least one piece of gold armor. Zombifies 15 seconds after entering the Overworld.
spawnConditions: Nether, any light level

name: Hoglin
description: Large aggressive Nether beast and the only breedable hostile mob. Fears warped fungus, nether portals, and respawn anchors — use these to keep them away.
spawnConditions: Crimson forest, any light level

name: Zoglin
description: Zombified hoglin created when a hoglin enters the Overworld or End. Attacks almost all mobs on sight and cannot be bred. Does not flee from anything.
spawnConditions: Created when hoglin enters the Overworld or End

name: Piglin Brute
description: Elite piglin guard found in bastion remnants. Always hostile regardless of gold armor and cannot be bartered with. Does not respawn once killed.
spawnConditions: Bastion remnants only, does not respawn

name: Strider
description: Passive Nether mob that walks on lava. Saddled and steered with a warped fungus on a stick. Shivers and turns purple when out of lava. The safest way to cross lava lakes.
spawnConditions: Lava surface in the Nether, any light level

name: Cow
description: Common passive farm animal. Provides leather and beef when killed, and can be milked with a bucket for milk that clears all status effects.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, 2+ block space

name: Pig
description: Passive farm animal that drops porkchops. Can be saddled and steered with a carrot on a stick. Transforms into a zombified piglin when struck by lightning.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, 2+ block space

name: Sheep
description: Passive mob that provides wool when sheared (1-3 wool, vs 1 from killing). Regrows wool by eating grass. Can be dyed any of 16 colors. Named "jeb_" cycles through all colors.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, 2+ block space

name: Chicken
description: Small passive mob that lays eggs every 5-10 minutes and takes no fall damage (flutters down). Feathers are essential for crafting arrows. Can hatch from thrown eggs (1/8 chance).
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, any solid block

name: Rabbit
description: Small fast passive mob. Rabbit feet are a rare drop (10% + Looting) used in brewing Leaping potions. 4 rabbit hides craft 1 leather. The Killer Bunny is a rare hostile variant.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass, sand, or snow block

name: Fox
description: Nocturnal mob that picks up items in its mouth and flees from players. Baby foxes bred by a player will trust that player. Snowy foxes spawn in snowy taiga biomes.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, taiga biomes

name: Wolf
description: Tameable with bones (1-12 needed). Loyal companion that attacks what you attack or what attacks you. Wild wolves have 8 HP; tamed wolves have 40 HP. Tail angle shows health.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, forest/taiga biomes

name: Ocelot
description: Shy jungle cat that can be gained trust with raw cod (must stand still and hold fish). Creepers and phantoms flee from ocelots within 6-16 blocks.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, jungle, above Y=63

name: Cat
description: Tameable with raw cod or salmon. Scares away creepers and phantoms within a 6-16 block radius. Brings morning gifts (string, feathers, rabbit hide, etc.) after the player sleeps.
spawnConditions: Villages (1 per 4 beds, max 10); swamp huts

name: Parrot
description: Colorful tameable bird that mimics nearby mob sounds — useful as a mob detector. Sits on your shoulder and dances near jukeboxes. Tamed with seeds. Cookies are lethal to parrots.
spawnConditions: Jungle, on logs or leaves

name: Horse
description: Rideable mount with random speed, jump height, and health stats. Tamed by repeatedly mounting until hearts appear. Equip with armor (no crafting needed) for protection.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, plains/savanna

name: Donkey
description: Rideable mount that can carry a chest (15 slots) for portable storage. Slower than horses but very practical for exploration. Cross with a horse to produce a mule.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, plains/savanna

name: Mule
description: Horse-donkey hybrid that carries chests like donkeys. Cannot breed further. Combines the speed of a horse with the storage of a donkey.
spawnConditions: Bred from horse + donkey

name: Llama
description: Pack animal that spits at threats. Forms caravans of up to 10 when one is led. Can be decorated with colored carpets and carry 3-15 slots depending on strength stat.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, savanna/mountain biomes

name: Trader Llama
description: Llama variant that accompanies the Wandering Trader. Attacks players who harm the trader by spitting. Can be tamed after the trader despawns or is killed.
spawnConditions: Accompanies wandering trader

name: Polar Bear
description: Arctic mob that is passive alone but highly aggressive when cubs are nearby. Swims well. Cannot be tamed or bred — purely wild. Adults attack foxes on sight.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, ice or grass block, frozen biomes

name: Panda
description: Bamboo-loving mob with 7 personality types (lazy, playful, worried, aggressive, weak, brown, normal). Breeding requires 8+ bamboo blocks within 5 blocks.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, jungle at Y=63+

name: Bee
description: Pollinating mob that enables honey and accelerates crop growth. Stings once when provoked (or hive harvested without campfire), then dies. Place campfire under hives for safe harvesting.
spawnConditions: Bee nests on trees during world generation

name: Goat
description: Mountain mob that rams other mobs and players every 30-300 seconds. Screaming goats (2% chance) ram 5× more often. Drops goat horns when ramming hard blocks.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, powder snow or stone, mountain biomes

name: Axolotl
description: Aquatic mob found in lush caves. Plays dead to regenerate health. Helps fight drowned, guardians, and elder guardians — grants Regeneration I when you kill what they're attacking.
spawnConditions: Water in lush caves, below Y=63, clay block within 5 blocks below

name: Glow Squid
description: Bioluminescent squid found in underground water below Y=30. Drops glow ink sacs for glowing signs and glowing item frames. Does not actually emit light.
spawnConditions: Water, below Y=30, light level 0

name: Squid
description: Common aquatic mob that squirts ink clouds when attacked. Ink sacs are used for black dye, dark signs, and crafting books and quills.
spawnConditions: Water, Y=50-64, any light level

name: Dolphin
description: Friendly aquatic mob that grants Dolphin's Grace (swim speed boost) when swimming nearby. Feed raw cod to make them lead you to buried treasure or ocean ruins.
spawnConditions: Water, non-frozen ocean biomes

name: Pufferfish
description: Inflates in 3 stages when players approach, dealing Poison for 7 seconds at full inflation. Used as a brewing ingredient for Water Breathing potions.
spawnConditions: Water, warm/lukewarm ocean biomes

name: Turtle
description: Beach-dwelling passive mob that returns to its home beach (where it hatched) to lay eggs. Baby turtles drop scute when growing up — 5 scutes craft a turtle helmet with Water Breathing.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, sand block, beach biomes

name: Mooshroom
description: Mushroom-covered cow found only in mushroom fields. Milked with bowls for mushroom stew (infinite food source). Feed a flower then milk for suspicious stew with that flower's effect.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, mycelium block, mushroom fields only

name: Frog
description: Amphibious mob with three variants: temperate (orange), warm (white), cold (green) — determined by the biome temperature where the tadpole grows up. Eats small slimes and small magma cubes to produce froglights.
spawnConditions: Grows from tadpole; spawns naturally in swamp biomes

name: Allay
description: Flying helper mob that collects matching items within 32 blocks and delivers them to note blocks. Found caged in pillager outposts and woodland mansions. Duplicates when given an amethyst shard near a jukebox.
spawnConditions: Found caged in pillager outposts and woodland mansions

name: Sniffer
description: Ancient mob hatched from sniffer eggs found in warm ocean ruins' suspicious sand. Sniffs the ground every 8 minutes to find torchflower seeds and pitcher pods — unique decorative plants.
spawnConditions: Hatched from sniffer eggs (found in suspicious sand)

name: Camel
description: Two-player rideable mount found in desert villages. Can dash forward to cross ravines. Tall enough (2.5 blocks) that most melee mobs can't reach riders — safe transport.
spawnConditions: Desert villages (1 per village)

name: Armadillo
description: Curls into a ball when scared by sprinting players, undead, or spiders. Naturally sheds armadillo scutes over time — use a brush to collect them. 6 scutes craft wolf armor.
spawnConditions: Light level 7+, grass block, savanna/badlands biomes

name: Breeze
description: Wind-powered mob found in trial chambers. Shoots wind charges that knock players back and interact with redstone components (buttons, levers, trapdoors). Immune to projectiles — use melee.
spawnConditions: Trial chamber spawners only

name: Bogged
description: Mossy skeleton variant that shoots Poison-tipped arrows (4s Poison). Has less health than regular skeletons. Can be sheared for mushrooms.
spawnConditions: Light level 0, swamp biomes; or trial chamber spawners

name: Creaking
description: Eerie mob that only moves when not being observed (like Weeping Angels). Invulnerable when linked to a creaking heart block — destroy the heart to kill it. Only spawns at night.
spawnConditions: Pale garden at night, linked to creaking heart block

name: Warden
description: Blind apex predator summoned by sculk shriekers after 4 activations. Detects by vibration and smell — sneak and avoid throwing items. Sonic boom attack bypasses armor. Do not fight; escape instead.
spawnConditions: Summoned after sculk shrieker activates 4 times

name: Ender Dragon
description: Final boss of the End dimension. Destroy the end crystals on obsidian towers first to prevent healing, then attack during its perching phase. First kill grants 12,000 XP. Can be resummoned with 4 end crystals.
spawnConditions: Spawns once on first End entry; resummoned with 4 end crystals

name: Wither
description: Player-summoned boss built from 4 soul sand/soil in a T-shape + 3 wither skulls on top. Creates a massive explosion on spawn. At half health, gains Wither Armor (immune to arrows). Nether star crafts a beacon.
spawnConditions: Built from 4 soul sand + 3 wither skeleton skulls

name: Villager
description: Passive NPC with 13 professions determined by job blocks. Trades improve through 5 levels (Novice→Master). Cure zombie villagers for heavily discounted prices. Need beds and workstations to breed.
spawnConditions: Villages; or cured zombie villagers; or bred (needs beds)

name: Wandering Trader
description: Randomly spawning trader offering biome-specific items like saplings, flowers, and dyes. Drinks invisibility potions at night. Despawns after 40-60 minutes.
spawnConditions: Random spawn near player every ~20 minutes

name: Bat
description: Tiny ambient mob that flies in dark caves. Completely harmless and drops nothing — purely atmospheric. Sleeps hanging upside down during the day.
spawnConditions: Light level 0-3, below Y=63, any solid block

name: Iron Golem
description: Powerful village protector that launches mobs skyward (deals 7.5-21.5 damage). Built from 4 iron blocks in a T-shape + carved pumpkin. Player-built golems won't attack you; village-spawned ones will if provoked.
spawnConditions: Villages (10+ villagers, 21+ beds); or built by player

name: Snow Golem
description: Player-built from 2 snow blocks + carved pumpkin. Throws snowballs at hostiles (no damage, but provokes). Leaves a snow trail in cold biomes. Melts in warm biomes and takes damage from rain and water.
spawnConditions: Built from 2 snow blocks + carved pumpkin

name: Cod
description: Common fish found in most ocean biomes. Can be caught with a fishing rod, killed for raw cod, or scooped into a bucket of cod for transport.
spawnConditions: Water, ocean biomes, Y=50-64

name: Salmon
description: Found in cold water biomes and rivers. Swims upstream in rivers. Drops raw salmon used in taming cats and ocelots.
spawnConditions: Water, cold oceans and rivers, Y=50-64

name: Tropical Fish
description: Colorful fish with over 2,700 natural variants in different shapes and color combinations. Bucket of tropical fish is used to breed axolotls.
spawnConditions: Water, warm/lukewarm oceans and lush caves

name: Tadpole
description: Baby frog that hatches from frogspawn. Grows into a frog whose variant (temperate, warm, cold) depends on the biome temperature where it matures. Can be picked up in a bucket for transport.
spawnConditions: Hatches from frogspawn laid by bred frogs

name: Zombie Villager
description: Undead villager curable with Splash Potion of Weakness + Golden Apple (3-5 min conversion). Cured villagers offer permanently discounted trades. Retains its profession when cured.
spawnConditions: Light level 0; or villager killed by zombie (0-50-100% by difficulty)

name: Skeleton Horse
description: Spawns from skeleton horse traps during thunderstorms. Lightning strikes spawn 4 skeleton horsemen. Kill the riders to tame the horses — they're the fastest mounts and can go underwater.
spawnConditions: Skeleton trap during thunderstorms (3.75-6.75% chance per lightning)

name: Zombie Horse
description: Undead horse that does not spawn naturally in Java Edition survival. Only obtainable via commands. Cannot be bred.
spawnConditions: Does not spawn naturally; commands only
